response.justification: A versatile, experienced full-stack engineer with 13+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and notably high-throughput low-latency microservices (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby), plus C/C++ systems work. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis — the core domain of this role. Title trajectory (Senior/Staff) and project descriptions also lack clear evidence of Principal/IC6-level cross-org technical leadership. Worth a screen to probe data/experimentation aptitude, but the specialized fit is uncertain.
strengths: 13+ years of broad engineering experience including high-scale, low-latency microservices
Solid systems-language background (C, C++, C#, Java, JS/TS) matching required stack
Demonstrated ownership and craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, founding an open-source platform)
concerns: No experimentation, feature-flagging, or growth-systems platform experience
Limited evidence of metrics/telemetry infrastructure and statistical/experimental analysis
Scope and impact read closer to Senior/Staff than Principal/IC6 cross-org leadership
